Name: Simple Random Sampling
Primary Applicable Scenarios: Fundamental method; applicable in small population with an easily obtainable list

Name: Stratified Sampling
Core Principle:
1st step: Stratify.
2nd step: Sample randomly within strata
Primary Applicable Scenarios: Clearly stratified population (subgroup representativeness should be ensured)

Name: Cluster Sampling
Core Principle: Randomly select clusters; survey all members within the clusters.
Primary Applicable Scenarios: Surveys where units are widely dispersed and implementation costs are high

Name: Multi-Stage Sampling
Core Principle: Combines different methods over multiple stages
Primary Applicable Scenarios: Large-scale, complex national or regional surveys

Name: Purpose Sampling
Core Principle: Subjective selection based on research purpose

Name: Quota Sampling
Core Principle: Fill quotas set to match population structure
Primary Applicable Scenarios: Market research, opinion polls where structurally approximate samples are obtained

Name: Snowball Sampling
Primary Applicable Scenarios: Research on hard-to-reach, hidden specific populations
